patch.value: Add registerExporter("gantt") -> pm gantt export with --format mermaid|html|ascii and --output. Add --group-by assignee, --from <iso>, --critical-path (longest dependency chain). Read items via pm list-all --json --include-body. Backward compatible with existing pm gantt.
Add gantt export (mermaid/html/ascii) + critical-path, assignee grouping, --from window

value.author: codex
value.text: Verified end-to-end in throwaway pm workspace: build clean, tsc --noEmit clean, 2/2 tests pass. extension doctor: active 1, runtime_active 1, 0 failures. pm gantt (default) backward-compatible; --group-by assignee, --critical-path (marks A->B->C->E 4-item chain, excludes shorter A->D branch), --from all work. pm gantt export --format mermaid|html|ascii verified well-formed. Bad --format/--from exit 2 (USAGE), no double-invocation. SDK: registerCommand with flags REQUIRES 'schema' capability in manifest or activation throws; kept schema, dropped unused renderers.

patch.value: Shipped: pm gantt export (mermaid/html/ascii), --critical-path, --group-by assignee, --from window. All verification passed (build, tsc, tests, functional doctor + commands).
